overall.summary: Overall score uses minimum dimension score 2 capped by highest severity CRITICAL.

proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: This proposal expands Uniswap protocol fees on v2 and v3 to Arbitrum, Base, Celo, OP Mainnet, Soneium, X Layer, Worldchain, and Zora. It also enables fees uniformly on all v3 pools via a new tier-based v3OpenFeeAdapter on Mainnet and the selected L2s, and routes fees to L2 TokenJars for UNI burn on Mainnet.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Change the owner on UniswapV3Factory to v3OpenFeeAdapter
claimed_actions.textual_evidence:
/// Change the owner on UniswapV3Factory to v3OpenFeeAdapter
V3_FEE_ADAPTER.setFactoryOwner(address(v3OpenFeeAdapter));

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Set the owner of the V3 Factory to the V3OpenFeeAdapter
claimed_actions.textual_evidence:
/// Set the owner of the V3 Factory to the V3OpenFeeAdapter
V3_FACTORY.setOwner(address(v3OpenFeeAdapter));

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Set the recipient of V2 protocol fees to the TokenJar
claimed_actions.textual_evidence:
/// Set the recipient of V2 protocol fees to the TokenJar
V2_FACTORY.setFeeTo(address(tokenJar));

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Transfer Uniswap v4 PoolManager owner role
claimed_actions.textual_evidence:
// Transfer Uniswap v4 PoolManager owner role
POOL_MANAGER.transferOwnership(CrossChainAccount)

claimed_complexity.reason: Involves executing ten transactions across multiple chains, setting up new fee architecture and fee adapters.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Because these transactions are crosschain, governance front ends may not decode them correctly.

limitations: No specific parameters for fees sizes, pools, or execution logic other than ownership and fee-to updates were provided in the text snippet itself.

conflict_detection.summary: An undisclosed address participates in an uncovered critical business action.

findings.title: Unaccounted trace addresses
findings.description: One or more addresses appeared in the trace without direct proposal text disclosure.
findings.recommendation: Pause or escalate manual review because an uncovered critical business action is linked to an undisclosed address.

depth_analysis.summary: Observed trace depth is consistent with the claimed complexity.
